title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TransIndia Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TransIndia Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!
